title: gnutls security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[3.8.3-10]
- Fix PKCS#11 token initialization label overflow (CVE-2025-9820)
- Fix name constraint processing performance issue (CVE-2025-14831)
full_text:
[3.8.3-10]
- Fix PKCS#11 token initialization label overflow (CVE-2025-9820)
- Fix name constraint processing performance issue (CVE-2025-14831)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-4188.html
